hero.title: Boost your sales with AI in 1 month
hero.subtitle: We deploy AI agents, playbook and sales stack, to give you direct control over traffic, funnel, and unit economics

transform.title: Reform your sales team with AI
transform.desc: Three pillars of transformation — from CRM to self-improving pipeline. Every step powered by AI agents that work 24/7.
transform.card1Desc: Reorganize or setup your CRM flow with AI instruments
transform.card2Desc: Deploy AI agents to do daily routine and improve customer experience
transform.card3Desc: Build self-improving pipeline for sales and marketing

agents.title: 4 AI agents working in the funnel 24/7
agents.agent1Desc: Responds to every inbound in WhatsApp in <30 sec, 24/7, in any language. Qualifies and books meetings. Simultaneously works with dormant base.
agents.agent2Desc: Monitors CRM in real time. Raises flag before a deal falls through. Forgotten touches, dead conversations — everything on the radar.
agents.agent3Desc: Manages campaigns on Google and Meta via API. Learns from qualified meetings (offline conversions) — optimizes for quality, not volume.
agents.agent4Desc: Builds landings, quizzes, email and WhatsApp templates per campaign or launch. Hours instead of weeks. A/B tests with Ads Pilot on the fly.

funnel.title: 3 funnel stages.
funnel.desc: Each stage is powered by a dedicated AI agent. Together they form a self-optimizing pipeline from first touch to closed deal.
funnel.card1Desc: AI Ads Pilot manages Meta + Google Ads via API. Optimizes for qualified meetings — quality, not volume.
funnel.card2Desc: AI Page Builder builds landing and quiz per campaign in hours. A/B tests on the fly.
funnel.card3Desc: AI Mia works with dormant base — segments, reactivates, drives to meeting.

flow.title: Customer flow with AI
flow.subtitle: From first touch to closed deal — AI handles the heavy lifting

dashboard.title: These are not slides. This is what the manager sees after the build.

kit.title: For every launch — complete kit in hand.
kit.desc: Page Builder, designer, and Mia assemble the kit per campaign or launch. Hours instead of weeks.
kit.card1Desc: Page Builder builds page per campaign from best-converting templates. A/B variants — on the fly.
kit.card2Desc: Designer together with Ads Pilot. Multiple formats per placement window, retarget to base.
kit.card3Desc: Per project — mailing to base with USP, phase updates, payment plan. Manager signatures — yours.
kit.card4Desc: Mia conducts first contact per project scenario. Manager receives hot leads with assembled context.

team.title: Reform your team with AI
team1Items: Call back those who didn't respond in messengers
Pick up complex dialogs that Mia passed to human
team2Items: Don't look for leads — first line fills calendars
Trainer coaches with real call recordings

timeline.title: 8 weeks of building. Then — sales and growth.
timeline.item2Desc: Team built, funnel launched. By week 8 — first sales.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How is this different from an ad agency?
faq.a1: An agency leaves — advertising stops. You're left with only contract debt. Direct is a sales department that stays with you: team on your payroll, configured CRM, playbook, creatives. We build in 8 weeks — then it works for you.
faq.q2: What happens to our current sales team?
faq.a2: We resolve in discovery — three scenarios: Integrate (strong team, we update playbook and tools), Strengthen (there are gaps, we hire missing roles), or Partially Replace (if objectively needed, you decide).
faq.q3: If after 3 months results are weak, can we exit?
faq.a3: 6 months is the minimum to reach target KPI. At 3 months of operation (month 5 from start) — checkpoint: On target → we continue, Close → we correct model, Doesn't work → we part ways with no penalties.
faq.q4: What if AI ruins a $200K–$2M deal?
faq.a4: AI only does work where it cannot make decisions affecting the sale. Mia answers typical questions, qualifies, books meetings. Does not name off-list prices, does not promise individual terms. Human escalation is automatic in 4 cases: off-list price, discount, low confidence score, or keywords like "lawyer", "contract", "escrow", "cancellation".
faq.a5: Structure: Retainer in two modes (months 1-3 build, months 4+ operations) + fixed percentage of closed revenue. Exact amount and percentage are calculated in discovery after reviewing project economics: GDV, sales cycle, unit types, market maturity.
faq.q6: What do we keep after the contract?
faq.a6: Team (SDR, managers) — on your payroll, they stay. CRM, playbook, knowledge base, creatives, landings — yours. AI agents — our IP. After contract they work by subscription $3.5k/mo or one-time purchase $50k. You can opt out — department works without AI, just slower.

cta.title: Does your project fit Direct?
cta.subtitle: 45 minutes. You show us the numbers — we tell you what to change, what KPI we can set, and if it makes sense to keep talking.
cta.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you soon.
cta.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.desc: Turnkey sales department for off-plan developers. Direct and channel sales. In 8 weeks we build team, playbook, sales stack and AI.
